description_long: This stereo sound system features a rectangular, boxy enclosure with a vibrant, graffiti-style collage covering its front and rear faces. The front panel is dominated by two prominent circular speaker cones, one large and one smaller, both set within a black frame that contrasts with the colorful artwork. The top and side panels are a solid, matte orange color, providing a bold visual accent to the otherwise busy design. The rear face is fully covered in the same graffiti motif but lacks any visible speaker components or controls. The enclosure appears to be constructed from wood or MDF, with a likely plastic or metal speaker grille and internal electronic components. No visible control panels, ports, or branding are present on any side.
description: A rectangular stereo sound system with a graffiti-covered front and rear, featuring two large black speaker cones and solid orange sides and top.
description_view_0: Front view showing two black speaker cones set in a graffiti-patterned panel framed in black.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, solid orange surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view with a full graffiti collage and no visible speaker components or controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain orange surface.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles are circular with a fine mesh texture, appearing as concentric rings or a subtle woven pattern, and are colored in dark gray or black.
